title: Sweet Squishy German Mars Bar Bars
description: Buttery, pillowy, indulgent German dessert featuring Mars bars and a hint of shio-koji cure, perfect for vegetarians. This sweet treat is a unique twist on traditional German desserts.
instructions: Preheat the oven to 350 degrees Fahrenheit.
In a large mixing bowl, cream together the butter and confectioners sugar until light and fluffy.
Add the shio-koji cure, flour, baking powder, and salt to the bowl and mix until just combined.
Stir in the chopped Mars bars and vanilla extract.
Press the mixture into a lined or greased 8-inch square baking dish.
Bake for 25 minutes or until the edges are lightly golden.
Remove from the oven and let cool completely in the pan.
Store any leftovers in an airtight container at room temperature for up to 5 days.
